zh.East Newton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾牛頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton於1291年出生在英國越可爾牛頓時，他的父親John de Thornton31歲，母親Dau Dalton31歲。他於1329年之前與Isabella de Newton在英國越可爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1333年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.East Newton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾牛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton于1291年出生在英国越可爾牛頓时，他的父亲John de Thornton31岁，母亲Dau Dalton31岁。他于1329年之前与Isabella de Newton在英国越可爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1333年在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton was born in 1291, in Newton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Thornton, was 31 and his mother, Dau Dalton, was 31. He married Isabella de Newton before 1329, in Newton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1333, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton est né en 1291, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Thornton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dau Dalton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Newton avant 1329, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1333, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton 1291 in Newton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Thornton 31 und seine Mutter Dau Dalton 31. Er hat vor 1329 in Newton, Yorkshire, England Isabella de Newton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1333 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton è nato il nel 1291 nel Newton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Thornton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Dau Dalton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Newton prima del 1329, nel Newton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1333, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newtonが1291年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父John de Thorntonは31歳，母Dau Daltonは31歳であった。1329年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンでIsabella de Newtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1333年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton(이)가 1291년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Thornton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Dau Dalton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1329년 이전 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 Isabella de Newton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1333년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.East Newton, Cambridgeshire, England: Newton, Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton nasceu em 1291, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Thornton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dau Dalton, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Newton antes 1329, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1333, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton родился в 1291 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Thornton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dau Dalton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Newton перед 1329 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1333 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Thornton, Lord of East Newton nació en 1291, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Thornton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Dau Dalton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Isabella de Newton antes de 1329, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1333, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
